title: 1) Count the number of needles
text:
• Count and memorize (or record) the number of needles used. This is very important.
Some needles can be missed, hiding behind the ears and hairline.
• Be careful not to drop any needles, and check again to see if you pulled out the same
number of needles you inserted.
• In the beginning, predetermine the number of needles necessary for the treatment. Use
an easy number to remember like 20, 25, or 30.
